About Us

Spaces that reflect who you are

Shivalay Interior is a full-service interior and exterior design studio working across residential and commercial projects throughout India. Our practice spans the full project lifecycle — from initial improvement plans and design concepts to detailed working drawings and hands-on site supervision.

Whether it's a French-contemporary apartment in Ayodhya, a Modern Industrial home in Maharashtra, or a jewellery showroom in Lucknow, every project is approached with the same care: understand the space, understand the client, and make something that lasts.

How We Work

Design Process

1

Discovery & Site Analysis

Understanding the space, your lifestyle, and the constraints. Every project begins with a thorough site visit and a conversation about how the space will be lived in.

2

Concept & Improvement Plan

Translating needs into a spatial strategy — space planning, flow, mood, and theme. Improvement plans ensure the existing structure is fully leveraged before new additions are designed.

3

Design Development

Full interior and exterior design: furniture layout, material palette, lighting, millwork, and elevations. All decisions are made with longevity and livability in mind.

4

Working Drawings

Precise construction documents — plans, sections, elevations, and detail drawings — that communicate the design intent clearly to contractors and fabricators on site.

5

Site Supervision & Execution

On-site presence to ensure the design is executed to specification. Quality checks at every stage, from structure to finishes, to ensure the finished space matches the vision.
